title: Form Submission
description: Capture form data and prevent default behavior.

slides.title: Handling Submit 📨
Full Form Example
slides.content: A complete controlled form with submission:

quizData.question: Why do we call `e.preventDefault()` in the submit handler?

options.text: To prevent the browser from reloading the page

quizData.explanation: By default, a form submit triggers a page reload. `preventDefault()` stops that behavior.
